allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem output/dhh-curriculum -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne "_extract_pdfs.py" -and $_.Directory.Name -ne "_extracted" } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash(timeout 8 python -m platformio device monitor -p COM4 -b 115200 --quiet)
